title: Velvety Peruvian Chicken Skillet
description: A flavorful and aromatic Peruvian-inspired dish featuring chicken, summer savory, and a hint of pickle, perfect for a low-calorie brunch. The combination of herbal notes and velvety texture creates a delightful culinary experience.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced red bell pepper to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Stir in the dried summer savory leaves, pickle juice, and chicken broth. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until heated through, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the Greek yogurt and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Season the skillet with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
